title: triosteum × eamesii
intro: Triosteum × eamesii, also known as Eames' Horse Gentian or Hybrid Horse Gentian, is a hybrid plant species belonging to the triosteum family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve gastrointestinal issues due to its bitter compounds. The plant has been found to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving circulation, and supporting the immune system. The herbal preparations of Triosteum × eamesii typically involve drying the roots and leaves, and then infusing them in hot water or using them in tinctures and capsules to utilize its medicinal properties.
